/usr/lib64/ccache/cc  -mavx2 -mfma -O3 -Wall -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/src/alloc.c.o CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/src/engine.c.o CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/src/dsp_avx2.c.o CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/src/loader.c.o CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/src/backend_alsa.c.o CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/src/repra_threads.c.o CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/src/mp3_internals.c.o CMakeFiles/repra_test.dir/tests/test_main.c.o -o repra_test  /usr/lib64/libasound.so
